summary: The ERP system is accessed via campus.audipay.org. Users log in using their phone number and a One-Time Password (OTP), with an option to set a permanent password. Upon successful login, the user is directed to a dashboard displaying the company/entity name and user ID. The interface is permission-based, meaning users only see options relevant to their role (e.g., fee clerk sees only fee options). The dashboard also shows the current session and allows searching for past sessions.
steps: Enter phone number and log in via OTP.
Optionally, set a password for future logins.
business_rules: Login is via phone number and OTP.
Interface is permission-based; options displayed depend on user role.
User ID and institute name are displayed on the dashboard.
important_notes: The URL campus.audipay.org should be saved or attached to the homescreen for easy access.
questions: How do I log in to the ERP system?
What is the URL for the ERP login page?
Can I set a password for my ERP account?
What information is displayed on the ERP dashboard?
Why do I see different options than other users on the dashboard?
